name: Escadrone
notes: Sales & integration for automated surveillance/inspection. Listed as authorized DJI Enterprise dealer for Dock 2.

name: Flying Eye
notes: DJI-recognised Dock 2 Flysafe kit in ecosystem catalogue. Dock demo events and webinars confirmed.

name: La Camera Embarquée (NETPIX)
notes: Dock 2 with Matrice 3D as turnkey autonomous station for automated missions up to 10km radius.

name: StudioSport
notes: Revendeur DJI N°1 en France. Markets Dock stations for automated industrial, surveillance and emergency missions.

name: ABOT
notes: Brands itself as 'votre expert drone autonome' around DJI Dock 2. SORA support and end-to-end assistance.

name: Geomesure
notes: Authorized DJI Enterprise dealer for Dock 2. Specific services not publicly detailed.

name: Instadrone
notes: Co-hosted Dock 2 webinar with Flying Eye. Early-stage/marketing evidence.

name: DJI Paris (Boutique)
notes: Official DJI retail store in France. Dock bundles for automated inspection and surveillance.

name: Powerloop
notes: Promoting Dock 3 as 24/7 autonomous solution. Fixed and vehicle-mounted deployments for security, inspection, emergency.

name: i-TechGroup (i-Techdrone)
notes: Claims first in France to test/adapt DJI Dock (2023). Industrial surveillance, topography, environment.

name: EPC France (EPC Groupe)
notes: Dock 2 test at Vignats quarry for routine mapping and monitoring. Treat as tested, not long-term deployed.

name: Prodrones
notes: prodrones.fr
column13: DJI Dock 2 product page found via Google.

name: DroneLand (Dutch Drone Group)
notes: First Dock 2 in Benelux. Developed mobile Pick-Hub with two Dock 3 units. Benelux distribution, installation, support.

name: Drone Class B.V.
notes: First DJI Dock operational in Netherlands (Aug 2023). Training and consultancy for BVLOS/remote-ops.

name: AirHub B.V.
notes: DJI ecosystem listed. Drone operations platform with Dock 2/3 integration, compliance packages, mission management.

name: Dronebotics
notes: Dock 2 as part of drone-in-a-box security solution. Dronebotics Commando Centrum API.

name: Vortex Hardware
notes: Referenced in Shell programme supply chain (Heliguy case study). Integration and localised support.

name: Skeye (Terra Drone Europe)
notes: Remote BVLOS drone-in-a-box for Shell. First EASA LUC in Netherlands. Remote flight centre operations.

name: Shell (Pernis / Europort)
notes: End-user: multiple DJI Dock systems at Pernis refinery and Europort tank farms. Operational for over a year.

name: Tata Steel Nederland
notes: Dock 2 + Matrice 3D for daily mapping flights measuring waste/stockpile volumes at IJmuiden site.

name: Droneshop.nl
notes: Dock 3 product page found via Google.

name: DroneWatch
notes: Dutch drone news. Reported 'Eerste DJI Dock in bedrijf gesteld in Nederland'.

name: COPTRZ
notes: UK-based DSP/SI. Dock use cases page appeared in NL search results.

name: Drone Parts Center
notes: Dock 3 features/pricing blog post.
